title: lobelia decurrens subsp. parviflora
intro: Lobelia decurrens subsp. parviflora, also known as small-flowered lobelia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Lobelia decurrens subsp. parviflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and aid in detoxification. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
